Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp.
Local Open Scope morcls.

Arguments CoproductArrow {_} {_} {_} _ {_}.
Arguments CoproductIn {_} {_} {_} _.
Arguments CoproductInCommutes {_} {_} {_} _ {_}.


(* We have to do this special stuff, because we come across
   a lot of equalities between coproduct inclusions, where
   the indexed objects are not the same (map, lifting problem map --> f)
   only because the lifting problems are not the same, the maps are
   in fact the same.

   In fact, all the inclusions we do are based on the (co)domain of the
   map of the lifting problem, and entirely independent of the lifting
   problem itself. This means that indeed, the inclusions should just
   be equal.

   In theory though, in a general case, the inclusions would not be equal,
   and differ by some idtoiso (see CoproductIn_idtoiso), since the
   objects that the inclusions originate from theoretically do not have
   to be the same.
*)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
a: total_category (morcls_disp J) → C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C (λ lp : morcls_lp J f, a (morcls_lp_map lp))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
S = S'
→ CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')


C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
a: total_category (morcls_disp J) → C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C (λ lp : morcls_lp J f, a (morcls_lp_map lp))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
S = S'
→ CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
a: total_category (morcls_disp J) → C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C (λ lp : morcls_lp J f, a (morcls_lp_map lp))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
H: S = S'
CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
a: total_category (morcls_disp J) → C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C (λ lp : morcls_lp J f, a (morcls_lp_map lp))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S: arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S)

  reflexivity.
Qed.

(* specialize domain / codomain cases *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C
(λ lp : morcls_lp J f, arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map lp)))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
S = S'
→ CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')


C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C
(λ lp : morcls_lp J f, arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map lp)))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
S = S'
→ CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')

  apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEq (a := λ f, arrow_dom (pr1 f))).
Qed.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C
(λ lp : morcls_lp J f, arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map lp)))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
S = S'
→ CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')


C: category
J: morphism_class C
f: arrow C
CCa: Coproduct (morcls_lp J f) C
(λ lp : morcls_lp J f, arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map lp)))
g: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S, S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧
S = S'
→ CoproductIn CCa (g,, S) = CoproductIn CCa (g,, S')

  apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEq (a := λ f, arrow_cod (pr1 f))).
Qed.

(* first try basic apply / use, the more expensive match statement *)
Ltac morcls_lp_coproduct_in_eq :=
  apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqCod) ||
  apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqDom) ||
  use (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqCod) ||
  use (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqDom) ||
    match goal with
    |- CoproductIn _ ?S = CoproductIn _ ?S'
      => apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqCod (S:=pr2 S)) ||
         apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqCod (S':=pr2 S')) ||
         apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqDom (S:=pr2 S)) ||
         apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqDom (S':=pr2 S'))
    end.

Section one_step_monad.

Context {C : category} (J : morphism_class C).
Context (CC : Colims C).

(* Garner 2008, section 5.2 (functor K) *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
functor_data (arrow C) (arrow C)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
functor_data (arrow C) (arrow C)

arrow C → arrow C

CC: Colims C
∏ a b : arrow C,
arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → arrow C ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

arrow C → arrow C

CC: Colims C
f: arrow C

    exact (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f).

→ arrow C

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
∏ i : morcls_lp J f,
C
⟦ (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
   arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))) i,
(λ g : morcls_lp J f',
 arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
  ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
    (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
     (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ) (pr1 lpJf)
      (pr2 lpJf)) i) ⟧
 (* map from lifting problem of S_f's left hand domain into that of S_f'
           The lifting problems have the same domain on the left, as f is the
           same. *)

J: morphism_class C

 exact (identity _).

i: morcls_lp J f
C
⟦ (λ g : morcls_lp J f,

(λ g : morcls_lp J f',
 arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
  ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
    (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
    (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ) (pr1 lpJf)
     (pr2 lpJf)) (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f)
  (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f')
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i))))
· morcls_lp_coprod CC J f' =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
     (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
      (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
       (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f')
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i))))
 (* commutativity of coproduct arrow inclusion with
         ∑_{x∈S_f} g_x and ∑_{x∈S_f'} g_x *)
      abstract (
        (* simpl; *)
        (* unfold morcls_lp_coprod; *)
        (* simpl; *)
        etrans; [use CoproductOfArrowsInclusion_comp|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [use CoproductOfArrowsInclusion_comp|];
        (* simpl; *)
        (* equality of coproduct of arrows *)
        apply maponpaths;
        apply funextsec;
        intro;
        etrans; [apply id_right|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply id_left|];
        reflexivity
      ).
Defined.

(# morcls_coprod_functor_data)%cat (identity f) =
identity (morcls_coprod_functor_data f)

i: morcls_lp J f
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) i
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f)
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · identity f)
        (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i) =

      (* simpl. *)

J: morphism_class C

· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f)

(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) i
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · identity f)
        (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i

      (* simpl. *)
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
i: morcls_lp J f
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
    (pr1 i,, pr2 i · identity f) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
i: morcls_lp J f
?b = CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
i: morcls_lp J f
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (pr1 i,, pr2 i · identity f) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
i: morcls_lp J f
pr2 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · identity f) = pr2 i

      (* apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqCod (S := pr2 i · _)). *)
      apply id_right.

functor_compax morcls_coprod_functor_data

· (# morcls_coprod_functor_data)%cat T

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g,
   (λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
    (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
     (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · T) (pr1 lpJf)
      (pr2 lpJf))
     ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J g,
       (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
        (S0 : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, g ⟧), g0,, S0 · S)
         (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
     (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
      arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
     (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
      arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J g,
    identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
   · (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
      identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0))))
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J g,
         (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S0 : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, g ⟧), g0,, S0 · S)
           (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
arrow_mor00
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor_data)%cat (S · T))

      (* simpl. *)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧

  (λ i : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i,, pr2 i · S · T)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
     (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
      arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
     (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
      arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g,
   identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
   · identity
       (arrow_dom
          (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (pr1 i,, pr2 i · S))))) =
?b

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C

T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
∏ i : morcls_lp J g,
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J g) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i0,, pr2 i0 · S · T)
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
       (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
        arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
       (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
        arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ x : morcls_lp J g,
     identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))) =
identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J h)
    (pr1 i,, pr2 i · (S · T))

· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i,, pr2 i · S · T)
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
       (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
        arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
       (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
        arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ x : morcls_lp J g,
     identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))) =
identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J h)
    (pr1 i,, pr2 i · (S · T))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g,
   (λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
    (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
     (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · T) (pr1 lpJf)
      (pr2 lpJf))
     ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J g,
       (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
        (S0 : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, g ⟧), g0,, S0 · S)
         (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
     (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
     (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J g,
    identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
   · (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
      identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0))))
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J g,
         (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S0 : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, g ⟧), g0,, S0 · S)
           (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
arrow_mor11
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor_data)%cat (S · T))

      (* simpl. *)

· identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (pr1 x,, pr2 x · S)))) =
?t2 x
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i,, pr2 i · S · T)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
     (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
     (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))) ?t2 =
arrow_mor11
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor_data)%cat (S · T))

              
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i,, pr2 i · S · T)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
     (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
     (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ x : morcls_lp J g,
   identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))) =
arrow_mor11
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor_data)%cat (S · T))


      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
∏ i : morcls_lp J g,
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J g) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i0,, pr2 i0 · S · T)
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
       (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
       (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ x : morcls_lp J g,
     identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))) =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J h)
    (pr1 i,, pr2 i · (S · T))

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
i: morcls_lp J g
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J g) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i : morcls_lp J g, pr1 i,, pr2 i · S · T)
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J g
       (λ g0 : morcls_lp J g,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g0))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J h
       (λ g : morcls_lp J h,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ x : morcls_lp J g,
     identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))) =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J h)
    (pr1 i,, pr2 i · (S · T))

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
i: morcls_lp J g
pr2 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · (S · T)) = pr2 i · S · T

      (* apply (CoproductInLiftingProblemsEqCod (S := pr2 i · _)). *)
      apply assoc.
Qed.

(* K in Garner *)
Definition morcls_coprod_functor : functor (arrow C) (arrow C) :=
    (_,, morcls_coprod_functor_is_functor).


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data morcls_coprod_functor
  (functor_identity (arrow C))

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data morcls_coprod_functor
  (functor_identity (arrow C))

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ morcls_coprod_functor f,
functor_identity (arrow C) f ⟧

  exact (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f).
Defined.

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C

  (functor_identity (arrow C))
  morcls_coprod_nat_trans_data

  (functor_identity (arrow C))

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ
· morcls_coprod_nat_trans_data f' =
morcls_coprod_nat_trans_data f
· (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ

   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
    identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i

(* φ in Garner 2007, p23 *)
Definition morcls_coprod_nat_trans :
    nat_trans morcls_coprod_functor (functor_identity _) :=
  (_,, morcls_coprod_nat_trans_is_nat_trans).

Arguments CoproductObject {_} {_} {_}.

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc: C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
C ⟦ E1 CC J f, E1 CC J f' ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc: C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
C ⟦ E1 CC J f, E1 CC J f' ⟧

  (* The map induced by pushouts on the front and back face
     (only the front face is drawn)
          ∑h
      ∑A ------> C
       |\ aa       \  cc
  ∑f=Kg|  \     ∑h'  \
       |    ∑A' -----> C
       v    |
      ∑B    |Kg'       |
        \   |=     PO    λ1f'
      bb  \ v∑f'       v
           ∑B' - - - > E1f'
  *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc: C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
CE1f':= cc · λ1 CC J f': C ⟦ arrow_dom f, E1 CC J f' ⟧
C ⟦ E1 CC J f, E1 CC J f' ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc: C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
CE1f':= cc · λ1 CC J f': C ⟦ arrow_dom f, E1 CC J f' ⟧
BE1f':= bb
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f'): C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f' ⟧
C ⟦ E1 CC J f, E1 CC J f' ⟧


  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc: C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
CE1f':= cc · λ1 CC J f': C ⟦ arrow_dom f, E1 CC J f' ⟧
BE1f':= bb
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f'): C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f' ⟧
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · BE1f' =
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · CE1f'


  abstract (
    (* Left to show commutativity of (outer) pushout diagram *)
    (* Kg · (arrow_mor11 Kγ) · (PushoutIn1 f') = (PushoutIn f) · γ00 · λ1f *)
    (* unfold CE1f', BE1f'; *)
    etrans; [apply assoc|];

    (* first rewrite commutativity of left face *)
    etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition; exact leftface|];
    etrans; [apply assoc'|];

    (* rewrite commutativity in top face *)
    apply pathsinv0;
    etrans; [apply assoc|];
    etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition; exact topface|];

    (* cancel precomposition with aa: ∑A --> ∑A' arrow *)
    etrans; [apply assoc'|];
    apply cancel_precomposition;

    (* all that's left is commutativity in the pushout square of f' *)
    apply pathsinv0;
    exact (PushoutSqrCommutes (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f'))
  ).
Defined.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc: C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· commuting_cube_construction leftface topface =
bb
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f')

leftface': morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb' =
aa' · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface': arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc' =
aa'
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
Hb: bb = bb'
Hc: cc = cc'
bb = bb'

    exact Hb.
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
aa: C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f' ⟧
bb: C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧

bb': C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f, morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f' ⟧
cc': C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom f' ⟧
leftface: morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · bb =
aa · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface: arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc =
aa
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')

aa' · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f'
topface': arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) · cc' =
aa'
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')
Hb: bb = bb'
Hc: cc = cc'
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· commuting_cube_construction leftface topface =
cc' · λ1 CC J f'

cc · λ1 CC J f' = cc' · λ1 CC J f'

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C

Hc: cc = cc'
cc = cc'

    exact Hc.
Qed.

(* one step comonad functor L1 sends f to λ1f *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ a b : arrow C,
arrow C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ arrow C ⟦ (λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) a,
  (λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) b ⟧
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow C ⟦ (λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) f,
(λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) f' ⟧

    (* The map on morphisms becomes the right face from the cube induced by
          ∑h
      ∑A ------> C
       |\          \  γ00
  ∑f=Kg|  \     ∑h'  \
       |    ∑A' -----> C
       v Kγ |
      ∑B    |Kg'       |
        \   |=     PO    λ1f'
          \ v∑f'       v
           ∑B' - - - > E1f'
    *)
    (* the morphism E1f --> E1f' we will need arises from the pushout
         property with the following maps. *)
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
Kγ:= (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ: arrow C ⟦ morcls_coprod_functor f,
morcls_coprod_functor f' ⟧
arrow C ⟦ (λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) f,
(λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) f' ⟧

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
Kγ:= (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ: arrow C ⟦ morcls_coprod_functor f,
morcls_coprod_functor f' ⟧
φγ:= nat_trans_ax morcls_coprod_nat_trans f f' γ: (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ
· morcls_coprod_nat_trans f' =
morcls_coprod_nat_trans f
· (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
arrow C ⟦ (λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) f,
(λ f : arrow C, λ1 CC J f) f' ⟧

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
Kγ:= (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ: arrow C ⟦ morcls_coprod_functor f,
morcls_coprod_functor f' ⟧
φγ:= nat_trans_ax morcls_coprod_nat_trans f f' γ: (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ
· morcls_coprod_nat_trans f' =
morcls_coprod_nat_trans f
· (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
φγ00:= arrow_mor00_eq φγ: arrow_mor00
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ
   · morcls_coprod_nat_trans f') =
arrow_mor00
  (morcls_coprod_nat_trans f
   · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)
arrow_mor00 γ · λ1 CC J f' =
λ1 CC J f
· commuting_cube_construction
    (one_step_comonad_functor_data_subproof f f' γ)
    (one_step_comonad_functor_data_subproof0 f f' γ)

      (* γ00 · λ1f' = λ1f · ccc *)
      (* This follows simply from the properties of a pushout *)
      abstract (
        apply commuting_cube_right_face
      ).
Defined.

· (# one_step_comonad_functor_data)%cat T

S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J g)
· pr21 ((# one_step_comonad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr21 ((# one_step_comonad_functor_data)%cat T) =
arrow_mor00 (S · T) · λ1 CC J h

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J g)
· pr21 ((# one_step_comonad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr21 ((# one_step_comonad_functor_data)%cat T) = 
?b

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
?b = arrow_mor00 (S · T) · λ1 CC J h

g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
λ1 CC J f
· pr21 ((# one_step_comonad_functor_data)%cat T) =

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
arrow_mor00 S · ?f' = arrow_mor00 (S · T) · λ1 CC J h

                
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
arrow_mor00 S · (arrow_mor00 T · λ1 CC J h) =
arrow_mor00 (S · T) · λ1 CC J h

        apply assoc.
Qed.

Definition one_step_comonad_functor : functor (arrow C) (arrow C) :=
    (_,, one_step_comonad_functor_is_functor).


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ)
· ρ1 CC J f' = ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ)
· ρ1 CC J f' = ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ

PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· (arrow_mor11 ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ)
   · ρ1 CC J f') =
PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· (ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
    identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
   · (λ j : morcls_lp J f', arrow_mor11 j)
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
         (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
           (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· (ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ)


    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· (ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ) =
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
   · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

· (ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ) = ?b

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?f' · arrow_mor11 γ =
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
   · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

· arrow_mor11 γ =

   identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
   · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

   · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ j : morcls_lp J f, arrow_mor11 j) i
   · arrow_mor11 γ) =
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
   · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))


    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(λ i : morcls_lp J f, arrow_mor11 i · arrow_mor11 γ) =
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
 · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(λ i : morcls_lp J f, arrow_mor11 i · arrow_mor11 γ) ~
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
 · arrow_mor11 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
x: morcls_lp J f
arrow_mor11 x · arrow_mor11 γ =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 x,, pr2 x · γ)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
x: morcls_lp J f
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map x)))
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 x,, pr2 x · γ) =
arrow_mor11 x · arrow_mor11 γ

    apply id_left.

   · ρ1 CC J f') =

· (ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ)

γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ = arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f'

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b = arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f'
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· ρ1 CC J f = ?f'
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?f' · arrow_mor11 γ = arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f'

            
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr2 f · arrow_mor11 γ = arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f'


    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f' = pr2 f · arrow_mor11 γ

    exact (arrow_mor_comm γ).
Qed.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
section_disp_data (three_disp C)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
section_disp_data (three_disp C)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) ?pr1

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
three_disp C f

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
∑ (xz : C ⟦ arrow_dom f, E1 CC J f ⟧)
(zy : C ⟦ E1 CC J f, arrow_cod f ⟧), xz · zy = f

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
λ1 CC J f · ρ1 CC J f = f

    abstract (
      apply λ1_ρ1_compat
    ).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  (λ f : arrow C,
   E1 CC J f,,
   λ1 CC J f,,
   ρ1 CC J f,, one_step_factorization_data_subproof f)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(E1 CC J f,,
 λ1 CC J f,,
 ρ1 CC J f,, one_step_factorization_data_subproof f) -->[
γ] (E1 CC J f',,
    λ1 CC J f',,
    ρ1 CC J f',,
    one_step_factorization_data_subproof f')

    (* cbn. *)
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
L1γ:= (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ: arrow C ⟦ one_step_comonad_functor f, one_step_comonad_functor f' ⟧
(E1 CC J f,,
 λ1 CC J f,,
 ρ1 CC J f,, one_step_factorization_data_subproof f) -->[
γ] (E1 CC J f',,
    λ1 CC J f',,
    ρ1 CC J f',,
    one_step_factorization_data_subproof f')

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
L1γ:= (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ: arrow C ⟦ one_step_comonad_functor f, one_step_comonad_functor f' ⟧
pr12 (E1 CC J f,,
      λ1 CC J f,,
      ρ1 CC J f,,
      one_step_factorization_data_subproof f)
· arrow_mor11 L1γ =
pr11 γ
· pr12 (E1 CC J f',,
        λ1 CC J f',,
        ρ1 CC J f',,
        one_step_factorization_data_subproof f')
× pr122 (E1 CC J f,,
         λ1 CC J f,,
         ρ1 CC J f,,
         one_step_factorization_data_subproof f)
  · pr21 γ =
  arrow_mor11 L1γ
  · pr122 (E1 CC J f',,
           λ1 CC J f',,
           ρ1 CC J f',,
           one_step_factorization_data_subproof f')

    abstract (
      split; apply pathsinv0; [
        (* commutativity of λ1 and arrow_mor11 (#L1 γ) *)
        exact (arrow_mor_comm L1γ)
      | (* commutativity of ρ1 and arrow_mor11 (#L1 γ) = arrow_mor00 (#R1 γ) *)
        apply one_step_comonad_ρ1_compat
      ]
    ).
Defined.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
section_disp_axioms one_step_factorization_data


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
section_disp_axioms one_step_factorization_data

  (* these identities follow from the functorality of f -> λ1f (one_step_comonad_functor)
  *)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  (identity x) =
id_disp (one_step_factorization_data x)
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  (f · g) =
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
         one_step_factorization_data g

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ x : arrow C,
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  (identity x) =
id_disp (one_step_factorization_data x)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  (identity f) =
id_disp (one_step_factorization_data f)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data (identity f)) =
pr1 (id_disp (one_step_factorization_data f))

    (* cbn. *)
    (* behavior of commuting cube construction on identity follows from
       identity axiom of the one_step_comonad_functor *)
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
one_step_comonad_id:= functor_id
  one_step_comonad_functor f: (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
  (identity f) =
identity
  (one_step_comonad_functor f)
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data (identity f)) =
pr1 (id_disp (one_step_factorization_data f))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
one_step_comonad_id:= functor_id
  one_step_comonad_functor f: (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
  (identity f) =
identity
  (one_step_comonad_functor f)
bottom:= arrow_mor11_eq one_step_comonad_id: arrow_mor11
  ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
     (identity f)) =
arrow_mor11
  (identity (one_step_comonad_functor f))
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data (identity f)) =
pr1 (id_disp (one_step_factorization_data f))

    exact bottom.
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
∏ (x y z : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  (f · g) =
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
         one_step_factorization_data g
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g1, g2, g3: arrow C
γ12: arrow C ⟦ g1, g2 ⟧
γ23: arrow C ⟦ g2, g3 ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  (γ12 · γ23) =
section_disp_on_morphisms one_step_factorization_data
  γ12 ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
           one_step_factorization_data γ23

    (* behavior of commuting cube construction on composition follows from
      identity axiom of the one_step_comonad_functor *)
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g1, g2, g3: arrow C
γ12: arrow C ⟦ g1, g2 ⟧
γ23: arrow C ⟦ g2, g3 ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data (γ12 · γ23)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data γ12 ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          one_step_factorization_data
                                          γ23)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g1, g2, g3: arrow C
γ12: arrow C ⟦ g1, g2 ⟧
γ23: arrow C ⟦ g2, g3 ⟧
one_step_comonad_comp:= functor_comp
  one_step_comonad_functor γ12
  γ23: (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
  (γ12 · γ23) =
(# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
  γ12
· (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
    γ23
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data (γ12 · γ23)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data γ12 ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          one_step_factorization_data
                                          γ23)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g1, g2, g3: arrow C
γ12: arrow C ⟦ g1, g2 ⟧
γ23: arrow C ⟦ g2, g3 ⟧
one_step_comonad_comp:= functor_comp
  one_step_comonad_functor γ12
  γ23: (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
  (γ12 · γ23) =
(# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
  γ12
· (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
    γ23
bottom:= arrow_mor11_eq one_step_comonad_comp: arrow_mor11
  ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat
     (γ12 · γ23)) =
arrow_mor11
  ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ12
   · (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ23)
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data (γ12 · γ23)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     one_step_factorization_data γ12 ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          one_step_factorization_data
                                          γ23)

    exact bottom.
Qed.

Definition one_step_factorization : functorial_factorization C :=
    (_,, one_step_factorization_axioms).

(* Lemma E1_compat (f : arrow C) : E1 CC J f = E1 J (opp_mor f) (CC _) POs.
Proof.
  reflexivity.
Qed.

Context (CCopp : ∏ (f : arrow (op_cat C)), Coproducts (morcls_lp (morphism_class_opp J) f) (op_cat C)) (POsopp : Pushouts (op_cat C)).

Lemma λ1_ρ1_opp_compat (f : arrow C) :
    arrow_cod (λ1 CC J f) = arrow_dom (ρ1 (morphism_class_opp J) (opp_arrow f) (CCopp _) POsopp).
Proof.
  cbn.
Defined. *)

· ρ1 CC J f' = ρ1 CC J f · arrow_mor11 γ

g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
(# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat (S · T) =
(# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S
· (# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C

pr1
  ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S
   · (# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C

T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧

pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
arrow_mor11 (S · T) =
pr21 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr21 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C

T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧

· pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)

g, f, h: arrow C

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
(# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat (S · T) = ?t2
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
arrow_mor11 ?t2 =
pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)

              
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
arrow_mor11
  ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat S
   · (# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat T) =
pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr11 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)

      reflexivity.
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g, f, h: arrow C
S: arrow C ⟦ g, f ⟧
T: arrow C ⟦ f, h ⟧
arrow_mor11 (S · T) =
pr21 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat S)
· pr21 ((# one_step_monad_functor_data)%cat T)
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition one_step_monad_functor : functor (arrow C) (arrow C) :=
    (_,, one_step_monad_functor_is_functor).


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data one_step_comonad_functor
  (functor_identity (arrow C))


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data one_step_comonad_functor
  (functor_identity (arrow C))

  (* Send λ1 f --> f along
      C ====== C
      |        |
  λ1f |   L1   | f
      v        v
    E1f ----> D
          ρ1f
  *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ one_step_comonad_functor f,
functor_identity (arrow C) f ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_dom f, pr11 f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ E1 CC J f, pr21 f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
?h · pr2 f = λ1 CC J f · ?k

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ arrow_dom f, pr11 f ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ E1 CC J f, pr21 f ⟧
 exact (ρ1 CC J f).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
identity (arrow_dom f) · pr2 f = λ1 CC J f · ρ1 CC J f
 abstract (exact (arrow_mor_comm (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_red CC J f))).
Defined.

  one_step_comonad_counit_data

· one_step_comonad_counit_data f' =
one_step_comonad_counit_data f
· (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ

C: category

    apply id_left.

 (* PushoutArrow (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout f (CC f) POs) ...
       · ρ1f' = ρ1f · γ11 *)
    (* We are trying to prove an equality of maps E1f --> arrow_cod f' *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?f' · pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')

              
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')


      (* simplify left hand side *)
      (* etrans. { simpl. reflexivity. } *)
      (* k_x · γ11 = arrow_mor11 (Kγ) · k_x' *)
      (* this is just the commutativity of the bottom square of the
         commutative cube of φ *)
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
φax:= nat_trans_ax morcls_coprod_nat_trans f f' γ: (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ · morcls_coprod_nat_trans f' =
morcls_coprod_nat_trans f · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
φax:= nat_trans_ax morcls_coprod_nat_trans f f' γ: (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ · morcls_coprod_nat_trans f' =
morcls_coprod_nat_trans f · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
bottom_square:= arrow_mor11_eq φax: arrow_mor11
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ
   · morcls_coprod_nat_trans f') =
arrow_mor11
  (morcls_coprod_nat_trans f
   · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat
       γ)
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f')

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
φax:= nat_trans_ax morcls_coprod_nat_trans f f' γ: (# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ · morcls_coprod_nat_trans f' =
morcls_coprod_nat_trans f · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
bottom_square:= arrow_mor11_eq φax: arrow_mor11
  ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ
   · morcls_coprod_nat_trans f') =
arrow_mor11
  (morcls_coprod_nat_trans f
   · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat
       γ)
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f') =
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)

      exact (bottom_square).

J: morphism_class C

PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· arrow_mor11
    ((# one_step_comonad_functor)%cat γ
     · one_step_comonad_counit_data f') =

J: morphism_class C

γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· arrow_mor11
    (one_step_comonad_counit_data f
     · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00 γ
· (λ1 CC J f' · pr21 (one_step_comonad_counit_data f')) =
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· arrow_mor11
    (one_step_comonad_counit_data f
     · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00 γ
· (λ1 CC J f' · pr21 (one_step_comonad_counit_data f')) =
?b

· arrow_mor11

     · (# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)

CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C

pr2 f · pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f'

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00 γ · pr2 f' =
pr2 f · pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)

      exact (arrow_mor_comm γ).
Qed.

Definition one_step_comonad_counit : nat_trans (one_step_comonad_functor) (functor_identity _) :=
    (_,, one_step_comonad_counit_is_nat_trans).


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data (functor_identity (arrow C))
  one_step_monad_functor


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data (functor_identity (arrow C))
  one_step_monad_functor

  (* Send f --> ρ1 f along
         λ1f
      C ----> E1f
      |        |
  f   |   R1   | ρ1f
      v        v
      D ====== D
  *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ functor_identity (arrow C) f,
one_step_monad_functor f ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ pr11 f, E1 CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ pr21 f, arrow_cod f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
?h · ρ1 CC J f = pr2 f · ?k

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ pr11 f, E1 CC J f ⟧
 exact (λ1 CC J f).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ pr21 f, arrow_cod f ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
λ1 CC J f · ρ1 CC J f = pr2 f · identity (pr21 f)
 abstract (exact (arrow_mor_comm (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_red_flipped CC J f))).
Defined.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
is_nat_trans (functor_identity (arrow C))
  one_step_monad_functor one_step_monad_unit_data


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C

  one_step_monad_functor one_step_monad_unit_data

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
(# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
· one_step_monad_unit_data f' =
one_step_monad_unit_data f
· (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00
  ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
   · one_step_monad_unit_data f') =
arrow_mor00
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ)
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11
  ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
   · one_step_monad_unit_data f') =
arrow_mor11
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00
  ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
   · one_step_monad_unit_data f') =
arrow_mor00
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor00
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ) =
arrow_mor00
  ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
   · one_step_monad_unit_data f')

    apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2.
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11
  ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
   · one_step_monad_unit_data f') =
arrow_mor11
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11
  ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ
   · one_step_monad_unit_data f') = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor11
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11
  (one_step_monad_unit_data f
   · (# one_step_monad_functor)%cat γ) =
pr21 ((# (functor_identity (arrow C)))%cat γ)

    apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition one_step_monad_unit : nat_trans (functor_identity _) (one_step_monad_functor) :=
    (_,, one_step_monad_unit_is_nat_trans).

(* ψf in Garner *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
morcls_lp J f → morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
morcls_lp J f → morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f)

  (* The inclusion of lifting problems is induced by
    S_f → S_{L1f} : x ↦ (g_x -- in_x -> Kf = ∑f -- ϵf -> L1f)
    where ϵf is morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_red:
              ∑h
    A ---> ∑A ---> X
    |      |       |
  g |    ∑g|       | λ1f
    v      v       v
    B ---> ∑B ---> E1f
    *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
arrow C ⟦ pr11 S, λ1 CC J f ⟧

  (* right hand square *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, λ1 CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= ?Goal: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
arrow C ⟦ pr11 S, λ1 CC J f ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, λ1 CC J f ⟧

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f, arrow_dom f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f, E1 CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
?h · λ1 CC J f = morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · ?k

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f, arrow_dom f ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f, E1 CC J f ⟧
 exact (PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· λ1 CC J f =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
 abstract (
        set (rhs := PushoutSqrCommutes (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f));
        exact (pathsinv0 rhs)
      ).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
arrow C ⟦ pr11 S, λ1 CC J f ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
arrow C ⟦ pr11 S, morcls_lp_coprod CC J f ⟧


  (* left hand square *)
  (* todo: generalize this *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
C ⟦ pr111 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
C ⟦ pr211 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
?h · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f = pr211 S · ?k

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
C ⟦ pr111 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f ⟧
 exact (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
C ⟦ pr211 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f ⟧
 exact (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
rhs_mor:= mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (λ1 CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
  (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f): arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f, 
λ1 CC J f ⟧
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S
· morcls_lp_coprod CC J f =
pr211 S · CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S
 abstract (exact (CoproductInCommutes _ _ S)).
Defined.

(* δf in Garner *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧

  (* the inclusion of the objects are just identity on themselves *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f)
  (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f)
  (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity
     ((λ H : morcls_lp J f,
       (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f),
        arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
         (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f H)) i))
· morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f)
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f))
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     identity
       ((λ H : morcls_lp J f,
         (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f),
          arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f H)) i))


  (* commutativity *)
  abstract (
    etrans; [use precompWithCoproductArrowInclusion|];
    (* simpl; *)
    apply pathsinv0;
    etrans; [use postcompWithCoproductArrow|];
    (* simpl; *)
    apply maponpaths;
    apply funextsec;
    intro S;
    apply pathsinv0;
    etrans; [apply id_left|];
    apply pathsinv0;
    etrans; [apply assoc'|];
    etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition; exact (CoproductOfArrowsInclusionIn _ _ _ _ S)|];
    etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition; apply id_left|];
    reflexivity
  ).
Defined.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data (fact_L one_step_factorization)
  (fact_L one_step_factorization
   ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
nat_trans_data (fact_L one_step_factorization)
  (fact_L one_step_factorization
   ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L one_step_factorization f,
(fact_L one_step_factorization
 ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization) f ⟧

  (* The map on morphisms becomes the right face from the cube induced by
          ∑h
      ∑A ------> C
       |\          =
  ∑f=Kg|  \     ∑h'  =
       |    ∑A' -----> C
       v δf |
      ∑B    |Kλf       |
        \   |=     PO    λ1f
          \ v∑λf f     v
           ∑B  - - - > E1f
    *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
arrow C ⟦ fact_L one_step_factorization f,
(fact_L one_step_factorization
 ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization) f ⟧


  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
C ⟦ three_ob0 (one_step_factorization f),
three_ob0
  (one_step_factorization
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
C ⟦ three_ob1 (one_step_factorization f),
three_ob1
  (one_step_factorization
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
?h
· three_mor01
    (one_step_factorization
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) =
three_mor01 (one_step_factorization f) · ?k

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
C ⟦ three_ob0 (one_step_factorization f),
three_ob0
  (one_step_factorization
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) ⟧
 exact (identity _).

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · arrow_mor11 δf =
arrow_mor00 δf
· morcls_lp_coprod CC J
    (fact_L one_step_factorization f)

      exact (pathsinv0 (arrow_mor_comm δf)).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· identity (arrow_dom f) =
arrow_mor00 δf
· arrow_mor00
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f))

      abstract (
        etrans; [apply id_right|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply precompWithCoproductArrowInclusion|];
        (* cbn. *)
        apply (maponpaths (CoproductArrow _));
        apply funextsec;
        intro S;
        etrans; [apply id_left|];
        exact (CoproductInCommutes _ _ S)
      ).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
δf:= morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f: arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J f,
morcls_lp_coprod CC J (λ1 CC J f) ⟧
identity (three_ob0 (one_step_factorization f))
· three_mor01
    (one_step_factorization
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) =
three_mor01 (one_step_factorization f)
· commuting_cube_construction (! arrow_mor_comm δf)
    (one_step_comonad_mul_data_subproof f)

    abstract (
      use commuting_cube_right_face
    ).
Defined.

       (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
· pr21 ((# (fact_L one_step_factorization
            ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ) =
?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f')
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f'))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f)
· (PushoutIn1
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
   · pr21 ((# (fact_L one_step_factorization
               ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)) =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f')
· PushoutIn1

       (fact_L one_step_factorization f'))

  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J

            ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ) =
?f'
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f) · ?f' =

· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f')
· PushoutIn1

       (fact_L one_step_factorization f'))

J: morphism_class C

f, f': arrow C

arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f)
· (arrow_mor11
     ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat
        ((# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ))
   · PushoutIn1
       (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J
          (fact_L one_step_factorization f'))) =

f, f': arrow C

      (* cbn. *)
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f)
· arrow_mor11
    ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat
       ((# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)) =

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f')
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ lpJf : morcls_lp J
               (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
    (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
     (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g,
          fact_L one_step_factorization f ⟧),
     g,, S · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)
      (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
     (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
     (λ g : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
    identity
      ((λ H : morcls_lp J f,
        (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f),
         arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
          (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f H)) i0)) i
   · (λ i0 : morcls_lp J
               (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
      identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0))))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)) =
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f')

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f') =
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
   pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
   · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
     (λ g : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
   · identity
       (arrow_cod
          (pr1
             (morcls_lp_map
                (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)))))

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
arrow_mor11 ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat γ)
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f') = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
?b =
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
   pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
   · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
     (λ g : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
   · identity
       (arrow_cod
          (pr1
             (morcls_lp_map
                (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)))))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
     ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
       (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
        (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
         (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
     (λ g : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
    identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
   · (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f',
      identity
        ((λ H : morcls_lp J f',
          (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f'),
           arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
            (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f' H)) i0))
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
         (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
           (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
   pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
   · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
     (λ g : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
   · identity
       (arrow_cod
          (pr1
             (morcls_lp_map
                (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)))))


      (* unfold CoproductOfArrowsInclusion. *)
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
∏ i : morcls_lp J f,
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
     morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
         (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
           (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i0))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
     (λ i1 : morcls_lp J f,
      identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i1))))
       i0
     · (λ i1 : morcls_lp J f',
        identity
          ((λ H : morcls_lp J f',
            (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f'),
             arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f' H)) i1))
         ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
           (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
            (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
             (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i0)) =
(λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
 (λ i1 : morcls_lp J f,
  identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1
          (morcls_lp_map
             (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i1))))
  · identity
      (arrow_cod
         (pr1
            (morcls_lp_map
               (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i1)))))
   i0
 · CoproductIn
     (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
        (λ g : morcls_lp J
                 (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
         arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
     ((λ i1 : morcls_lp J f,
       pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i1),,
       pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i1)
       · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ) i0))
  i

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
         (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
           (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
      identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
     · (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f',
        identity
          ((λ H : morcls_lp J f',
            (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f'),
             arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f' H)) i0))
         ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
           (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
            (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
             (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
  identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1
          (morcls_lp_map
             (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0))))
  · identity
      (arrow_cod
         (pr1
            (morcls_lp_map
               (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0)))))
   i
 · CoproductIn
     (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
        (λ g : morcls_lp J
                 (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
         arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
     ((λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
       pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0),,
       pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0)
       · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ) i))
  i

      (* simpl. *)
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
       (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
     · identity
         (arrow_cod
            (pr1
               (morcls_lp_map
                  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
                     (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)))))) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
?b =
identity
  (arrow_cod
     (pr1
        (morcls_lp_map
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1
          (morcls_lp_map
             (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· CoproductIn
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
     pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
     · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
 · identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
                 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)))))) i
· CoproductIn
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    ((λ i : morcls_lp J f,
      morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
        (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)) i) =
identity
  (arrow_cod
     (pr1
        (morcls_lp_map
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1
          (morcls_lp_map
             (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· CoproductIn
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
     pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
     · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1
          (morcls_lp_map
             (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
                (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)))))
· CoproductIn
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
       (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)) = ?b

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· (identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
                 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)))))
   · CoproductIn
       (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
          (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
          (λ g : morcls_lp J
                   (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
           arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
          (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))) =
identity
  (arrow_cod
     (pr1
        (morcls_lp_map
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· identity
    (arrow_cod
       (pr1
          (morcls_lp_map
             (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· CoproductIn
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
       (λ g : morcls_lp J
                (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
     pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
     · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)

     (fact_L one_step_factorization f')
     (λ g : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f'),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f'
     (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)) =

   mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f')
     (λ1 CC J f')

     (PushoutIn1

         (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

         (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))

         (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))))

pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor (pr211 i)
        (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) i)
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i)
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f i))
· ?f' =
arrow_mor11
  (let rhs_mor :=
     mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f')
       (λ1 CC J f')
       (arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f'))
       (PushoutIn1
          (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f'))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f') in
   postcompose rhs_mor
     (mors_to_arrow_mor (pr211 i)
        (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f')
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f')
           (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f')
           (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f'
           (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) i
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f')
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J f,
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, f ⟧), g,, S · γ)
        (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f') =
arrow_mor11
  (let rhs_mor :=
     mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f')
       (λ1 CC J f')
       (arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f'))
       (PushoutIn1
          (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f'))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof f') in
   postcompose rhs_mor
     (mors_to_arrow_mor (pr211 i)
        (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f')
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f')
           (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f')
           (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f'
           (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ))))

J: morphism_class C

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
i: morcls_lp J f
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f')
    (pr1 i,, pr2 i · γ)
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f') = ?b

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· arrow_mor11
    ((# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ
     · one_step_comonad_mul_data f') =

· arrow_mor11
    (one_step_comonad_mul_data f
     · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization
           ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ)

γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
identity (arrow_dom f)
· λ1 CC J (fact_L one_step_factorization f)
· pr21 ((# (fact_L one_step_factorization
            ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat γ) =
arrow_mor00 γ
· λ1 CC J (fact_L one_step_factorization f')

f, f': arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, f' ⟧
identity (arrow_dom f)
· (arrow_mor00

   · λ1 CC J (fact_L one_step_factorization f')) =

      apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition one_step_comonad_mul :
    nat_trans
      (fact_L one_step_factorization)
      (functor_composite (fact_L one_step_factorization) (fact_L one_step_factorization)) :=
  (_,, one_step_comonad_mul_is_nat_trans).

(* Definition one_step_comonad_functor_with_μ : functor_with_μ (op_cat (arrow C)) :=
    (functor_opp one_step_comonad_functor,, op_nt one_step_comonad_mul). *)

Definition one_step_comonad_data : disp_Comonad_data _ :=
    L_monad_data one_step_factorization one_step_comonad_mul.

       (disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f)) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f
   · disp_δ one_step_comonad_data
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f))

         ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization) f))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f)
· arrow_mor11
    (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) =
arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_map f)
· arrow_mor11
    ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat
       (disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f))
