C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
(λ i : morcls_lp J (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i))))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S)
· CoproductIn
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization
          (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J
                 (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g,
            fact_L one_step_factorization f ⟧),
       g,, S · disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f)
        (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S)) =
CoproductIn
  (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f)
     (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))

J: morphism_class C

     (pr1
        (morcls_lp_map
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))))
· CoproductIn
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J
       (fact_L one_step_factorization
          (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
    (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S),,
     pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S)
     · disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f) = ?b

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
CoproductIn
  (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S),,
   pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S)
   · disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f) =
CoproductIn
  (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J
     (fact_L one_step_factorization
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion
     (fact_L one_step_factorization f)
     (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
pr2
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S),,
   pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S)
   · disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f) =
(let rhs_mor :=
   mors_to_arrow_mor
     (morcls_lp_coprod CC J
        (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
     (λ1 CC J (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
     (arrow_mor00
        (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J
           (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
     (PushoutIn1

        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S)
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S)
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f S))
· ?f' =
arrow_mor11
  (let rhs_mor :=
     mors_to_arrow_mor
       (morcls_lp_coprod CC J
          (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
       (λ1 CC J (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
       (arrow_mor00
          (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J
             (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
       (PushoutIn1
          (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J
             (fact_L one_step_factorization f)))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof
          (fact_L one_step_factorization f)) in
   postcompose rhs_mor
     (mors_to_arrow_mor
        (pr211 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))
        (morcls_lp_coprod CC J
           (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
        (CoproductIn
           (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))
        (CoproductIn
           (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0
           (fact_L one_step_factorization f)
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S))))

(λ i : morcls_lp J f,

   ((λ H : morcls_lp J f,
     (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f),
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f H)) i)) S

        (morcls_lp_coprod CC J

        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0
           (fact_L one_step_factorization f)
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f S)))

λ1 CC J
  ((fact_L one_step_factorization
    ∙ fact_L one_step_factorization) f)

    apply id_left.
Qed.

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
    identity
      ((λ H : morcls_lp J f,
        (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f),
         arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
          (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f H)) i0)) i
   · (λ j : morcls_lp J
              (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
      arrow_mor11 j)
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)) =
PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f) =
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
   · arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))


      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
∏ i : morcls_lp J f,
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f) =
(λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
 identity
   (arrow_cod
      (pr1
         (morcls_lp_map
            (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0))))
 · arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0)) i

f: arrow C
i: morcls_lp J f
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f) =
(λ i : morcls_lp J f,
 identity
   (arrow_cod
      (pr1
         (morcls_lp_map
            (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
 · arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)) i

      (* cbn. *)

J: morphism_class C

f: arrow C
i: morcls_lp J f
identity
  (arrow_cod
     (pr1
        (morcls_lp_map
           (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)

      apply id_left.

     ((# morcls_coprod_functor)%cat
        (disp_ε one_step_comonad_data f))
   · PushoutIn1
       (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J
          (functor_identity (arrow C) f))) = ?b

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ lpJf : morcls_lp J
               (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
    (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
     (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g,
          fact_L one_step_factorization f ⟧),
     g,, S · disp_ε one_step_comonad_data f)
      (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
     (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
    identity
      ((λ H : morcls_lp J f,
        (λ g : morcls_lp J (λ1 CC J f),
         arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g)))
          (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f H)) i0)) i
   · (λ i0 : morcls_lp J
               (fact_L one_step_factorization f),
      identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0))))
       (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)) =
identity (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f)

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
identity (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) =
CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
   pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
   · disp_ε one_step_comonad_data f)
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
     (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
      arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
   identity
     (arrow_cod
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
   · identity
       (arrow_cod
          (pr1
             (morcls_lp_map
                (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)))))


      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
∏ i : morcls_lp J f,
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i
· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
     pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0),,
     pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0)
     · disp_ε one_step_comonad_data f)
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J f,
     identity
       (arrow_cod
          (pr1
             (morcls_lp_map
                (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0))))
     · identity
         (arrow_cod
            (pr1
               (morcls_lp_map
                  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i0))))) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) i

· CoproductOfArrowsInclusion
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i),,
     pr2 (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i)
     · disp_ε one_step_comonad_data f)
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (LiftingWithClass.CC CC J f
       (λ g : morcls_lp J f,
        arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))))
    (λ i : morcls_lp J f,
     identity
       (arrow_cod
          (pr1
             (morcls_lp_map
                (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))
     · identity
         (arrow_cod
            (pr1
               (morcls_lp_map
                  (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion f i))))) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S

        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f S))
· ?f' = arrow_mor11 (pr2 S)

                
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor (pr211 S)
        (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S)
        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S)
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f S))
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) =
arrow_mor11 (pr2 S)

        (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S)
        (morcls_lp_coprod_L1_inclusion_subproof0 f S))
· arrow_mor11 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f) = 
?b

CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
?b = arrow_mor11 (pr2 S)

        reflexivity.

     · (# (fact_L one_step_factorization))%cat

J: morphism_class C

f: arrow C

  (disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f

       (disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f)) =

       (fact_L one_step_factorization f))

  (disp_δ one_step_comonad_data f
   · disp_δ one_step_comonad_data
       (fact_L one_step_factorization f))
 exact (one_step_comonad_assoc_law11 f).
Qed.

Definition one_step_comonad :
    lnwfs_over one_step_factorization :=
  (one_step_comonad_mul,, one_step_comonad_laws).

End one_step_monad.
